tasks.title: Backend list_messages_with_cases service method
tasks.description: Implement list_messages_with_cases in generation service that joins TestCase to messages via generation_session_id, returning cases embedded in each assistant message.
tasks.acceptance: GET /api/sessions/{id}/messages returns cases array within each assistant message object

tasks.title: Update GET /sessions/{id}/messages router
tasks.description: Update the generation router to use list_messages_with_cases for the messages endpoint, ensuring test cases are included in the response.
tasks.acceptance: Router endpoint calls list_messages_with_cases and returns MessageWithCases schema

tasks.title: Frontend WorkbenchTestCase add precondition field
tasks.description: Add precondition field to the WorkbenchTestCase type in workspace-store.ts to support displaying test case preconditions.
tasks.acceptance: WorkbenchTestCase type includes optional precondition: string field in workspace-store.ts

tasks.title: CaseCard add precondition prop and display
tasks.description: Add precondition prop to CaseCard component with styled display section showing preconditions before test steps.
tasks.acceptance: CaseCard renders precondition text in a styled block when provided

tasks.title: ChatArea pass precondition to CaseCard
tasks.description: Update ChatArea component to pass the precondition field from message cases to the CaseCard component.
tasks.acceptance: CaseCard in ChatArea receives and displays precondition from each test case

tasks.title: GeneratedCases pass precondition to CaseCard
tasks.description: Update GeneratedCases component to pass the precondition field from filtered cases to the CaseCard component.
tasks.acceptance: CaseCard in GeneratedCases receives and displays precondition from each test case

tasks.title: SSE stream test - verify cases appear after AI generation
tasks.description: Manually test SSE streaming flow: send a generation request, verify that CaseCards appear in ChatArea as the AI stream completes and cases are auto-parsed.
tasks.acceptance: After AI generation SSE completes, CaseCards with steps and precondition render in the chat area without page refresh

tasks.title: Workbench message history reload verification
tasks.description: Verify that after page refresh, workbench reloads all messages with embedded test cases from the database, maintaining full conversation history.
tasks.acceptance: Page refresh on /workbench/{id} restores all messages with their CaseCards and steps intact

tasks.title: CaseCard expand/collapse steps verification
tasks.description: Verify CaseCard expand/collapse toggle works correctly for showing and hiding test case steps in both ChatArea and GeneratedCases views.
tasks.acceptance: Clicking expand/collapse on CaseCard toggles step visibility smoothly with animation

tasks.title: Workbench E2E test with real AI generation
tasks.description: End-to-end test of the full workbench flow: select requirement, choose generation mode, send prompt, observe SSE streaming, verify parsed cases, refresh page and verify persistence.
tasks.acceptance: Full workbench flow from prompt to persisted CaseCards works without errors in both streaming and reload scenarios

tasks.title: Add clean_status/quality_score/original_raw columns to TestCase model
tasks.description: Add clean_status (enum: raw/cleaned/verified), quality_score (Float, 0-1), and original_raw (Text) fields to the TestCase SQLAlchemy model for tracking cleaning state.
tasks.acceptance: TestCase model has clean_status, quality_score, and original_raw columns defined with proper types and defaults

tasks.title: Generate Alembic migration for new TestCase fields
tasks.description: Run alembic revision --autogenerate to create a migration file for the clean_status, quality_score, and original_raw columns added to TestCase.
tasks.acceptance: Alembic migration file exists and correctly adds the three new columns to test_cases table

tasks.title: Run Alembic migration for TestCase cleaning fields
tasks.description: Execute alembic upgrade head to apply the new TestCase cleaning columns to the database.
tasks.acceptance: Database table test_cases has clean_status, quality_score, and original_raw columns after migration

tasks.title: Create engine/import_clean/cleaner.py with strip_html_tags
tasks.description: Create cleaner.py in the import_clean engine with a strip_html_tags function that removes HTML tags, decodes entities, and normalizes whitespace from test case text fields.
tasks.acceptance:
strip_html_tags('

Test & verify

') returns 'Test & verify' with no HTML artifacts

tasks.title: Create normalize_empty_values in cleaner.py
tasks.description: Add normalize_empty_values function to cleaner.py that converts various empty representations (N/A, null, -, empty string, whitespace-only) to None for consistent data handling.
tasks.acceptance: normalize_empty_values handles 'N/A', 'null', '-', '', '  ' all returning None, while preserving real values

tasks.title: Create score_test_case quality scoring in cleaner.py
tasks.description: Add score_test_case function that evaluates test case quality on a 0-1 scale based on: has steps, step completeness, has expected results, title clarity, no HTML remnants.
tasks.acceptance: score_test_case returns float 0-1; a well-formed case scores >0.8, a case with only a title scores <0.4

tasks.title: Create llm_clean_case for LLM-powered cleaning
tasks.description: Add llm_clean_case function that sends low-quality test cases to Qwen-Max for intelligent rewriting of steps, expected results, and preconditions while preserving intent.
tasks.acceptance: llm_clean_case rewrites a messy test case into structured steps/expected format; uses safe JSON extraction per project spec

tasks.title: Write unit tests for cleaner.py
tasks.description: Write pytest unit tests covering strip_html_tags, normalize_empty_values, score_test_case, and llm_clean_case (with mocked LLM) in cleaner.py.
tasks.acceptance: All cleaner tests pass with pytest -v; covers edge cases for HTML stripping, empty value normalization, and scoring thresholds

tasks.title: Create engine/import_clean/batch_parser.py with normalize_csv_row
tasks.description: Create batch_parser.py with normalize_csv_row function that maps varying CSV column names (e.g., '用例标题'/'TestCase Name') to the canonical TestCase schema fields.
tasks.acceptance: normalize_csv_row correctly maps Chinese and English column headers to TestCase fields for at least 5 known CSV formats

tasks.title: Create extract_module_from_path in batch_parser.py
tasks.description: Add extract_module_from_path function that infers the product/module name from a CSV file path based on directory structure and filename conventions.
tasks.acceptance: extract_module_from_path('待清洗数据/数据中台/用户管理/cases.csv') returns structured module info with product='数据中台', module='用户管理'

tasks.title: Create parse_csv_file with format auto-detection
tasks.description: Add parse_csv_file function that auto-detects encoding (utf-8/gbk/gb2312), delimiter (comma/tab/pipe), and header row position, then parses CSV into normalized row dicts.
tasks.acceptance: parse_csv_file handles GBK-encoded, tab-delimited CSVs with BOM and header on row 2; returns list of normalized dicts

tasks.title: Create discover_csv_files for recursive CSV scanning
tasks.description: Add discover_csv_files function that recursively scans a directory for CSV files, returning file paths with metadata (size, row count estimate, encoding).
tasks.acceptance: discover_csv_files('待清洗数据/') finds all 65 CSV files with correct paths and metadata

tasks.title: Write unit tests for batch_parser.py
tasks.description: Write pytest unit tests for normalize_csv_row, extract_module_from_path, parse_csv_file, and discover_csv_files with sample CSV fixtures.
tasks.acceptance: All batch_parser tests pass with pytest -v; includes fixtures for different CSV encodings and formats

tasks.title: Create import_clean/tasks.py Celery task for batch cleaning
tasks.description: Create Celery task that orchestrates batch CSV import: discover files → parse → clean → score → optionally LLM-clean low-quality cases → upsert into test_cases table.
tasks.acceptance: Celery task processes CSV files asynchronously, reports progress via Redis, and upserts cleaned cases with idempotent behavior

tasks.title: Add POST /import-clean/trigger endpoint
tasks.description: Add router endpoint to trigger the batch cleaning Celery task, accepting optional directory path and cleaning options (skip_llm, min_quality_threshold).
tasks.acceptance: POST /api/import-clean/trigger returns task_id and starts the Celery cleaning pipeline in background

tasks.title: Add GET /import-clean/status/{task_id} endpoint
tasks.description: Add router endpoint to query Celery task progress including files processed, cases imported, quality distribution, and current state.
tasks.acceptance: GET /api/import-clean/status/{task_id} returns progress JSON with processed_files, total_cases, avg_quality_score, and task state

tasks.title: Add Qdrant vectorization step after cleaning
tasks.description: After cleaning and upserting cases, vectorize test case text using the RAG embedder and store vectors in Qdrant for similarity search.
tasks.acceptance: Cleaned test cases are embedded and stored in Qdrant collection; similarity search returns relevant cases

tasks.title: Write integration tests for cleaning pipeline
tasks.description: Write integration tests that run the full cleaning pipeline on sample CSV files, verifying database state, quality scores, and error handling.
tasks.acceptance: Integration tests pass with sample CSVs; verify upsert idempotency, quality scoring accuracy, and error recovery

tasks.title: Frontend clean comparison view (CleanCompare component)
tasks.description: Create CleanCompare component showing original vs cleaned test case side-by-side with diff highlighting, quality score badge, and approve/reject controls.
tasks.acceptance: CleanCompare renders original and cleaned text side-by-side with quality score; uses sy-* design tokens and no hardcoded colors

tasks.title: E2E test: import CSV → clean → verify quality scores
tasks.description: End-to-end test of the full data cleaning flow: trigger import via API, monitor progress, verify cleaned cases in database with correct quality scores and clean_status.
tasks.acceptance: Full pipeline processes sample CSVs, quality scores are within expected ranges, and cases are queryable via testcases API

tasks.title: Create core/encryption.py with Fernet encrypt/decrypt
tasks.description: Create encryption utility module using Fernet symmetric encryption for storing API keys securely in the database with key derived from app secret.
tasks.acceptance: encrypt('sk-test123') produces encrypted bytes; decrypt(encrypted) returns 'sk-test123'; uses ENCRYPTION_KEY from env

tasks.title: Write unit tests for encryption module
tasks.description: Write pytest tests for encrypt/decrypt round-trip, wrong key handling, empty input, and unicode string support.
tasks.acceptance: All encryption tests pass; covers round-trip, invalid key error, empty string, and Chinese character encryption

tasks.title: Add api_keys JSONB field to AiConfiguration model
tasks.description: Add api_keys JSONB column to AiConfiguration model for storing encrypted API keys per provider (zhipu, dashscope, openai).
tasks.acceptance: AiConfiguration model has api_keys JSONB field with default empty dict; stores encrypted key strings per provider

tasks.title: Add vector_config JSONB field to AiConfiguration model
tasks.description: Add vector_config JSONB column to AiConfiguration model for storing embedding model settings (model name, dimension, batch size, provider).
tasks.acceptance: AiConfiguration model has vector_config JSONB field; supports embedding model configuration per provider

tasks.title: Generate Alembic migration for AI config fields
tasks.description: Generate and run Alembic migration to add api_keys and vector_config JSONB columns to the ai_configurations table.
tasks.acceptance: Migration adds both JSONB columns; upgrade and downgrade both work correctly

tasks.title: Add POST /ai-config/test-llm connection test endpoint
tasks.description: Add endpoint that tests LLM API connectivity by sending a simple prompt to the specified provider/model and returning success/failure with latency.
tasks.acceptance: POST /api/ai-config/test-llm with provider and api_key returns {success: true, latency_ms: N} or error message

tasks.title: Add POST /ai-config/test-embedding connection test endpoint
tasks.description: Add endpoint that tests embedding API connectivity by encoding a sample text and returning success/failure with vector dimension info.
tasks.acceptance: POST /api/ai-config/test-embedding returns {success: true, dimension: 1024} or error details

tasks.title: Write tests for connection test endpoints
tasks.description: Write pytest tests for both LLM and embedding connection test endpoints with mocked API calls, covering success, timeout, and auth failure scenarios.
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover success/timeout/auth-error for both test-llm and test-embedding endpoints

tasks.title: Create ParamTooltip frontend component

tasks.description: Create ConnectionTestButton component with loading state (Loader2 animate-spin), success (green check), and error (red x with message) states.
tasks.acceptance: Button shows idle → spinning → success/error states; uses Loader2 icon and sy-accent/sy-danger colors

tasks.title: Create VectorModelSettings frontend component
tasks.description: Create VectorModelSettings component for configuring embedding model provider, model name, dimension, and batch size with connection test button.

tasks.title: Integrate API Key input into AIModelSettings
tasks.description: Add masked API key input fields to the existing AIModelSettings component with save/reveal toggle and encrypted storage via the backend.
tasks.acceptance: API key inputs show masked values, reveal on click, save encrypted via PUT /api/ai-config; existing settings functionality preserved

tasks.title: Integrate ParamTooltip into slider controls
tasks.description: Add ParamTooltip to each slider control (temperature, top_p, max_tokens) in the AIModelSettings component for contextual parameter help.
tasks.acceptance: Each model parameter slider has an info icon that shows tooltip with parameter explanation on hover

tasks.title: Integrate ConnectionTestButton into model panels
tasks.description: Add ConnectionTestButton to each model provider panel in AIModelSettings, wired to the test-llm endpoint with the configured API key.

tasks.title: Frontend type check and lint verification for settings

tasks.acceptance: tsc --noEmit and biome check pass with zero errors for all settings components

tasks.title: M04 Scene node CRUD operations

tasks.title: M06 TestCase CRUD operations

tasks.acceptance: CRUD operations work with proper soft-delete; deleted cases filtered from default queries

tasks.acceptance: Batch operations accept array of IDs and update all selected cases atomically

tasks.acceptance: Diff page shows text diff with color-coded changes and semantic impact panel

tasks.acceptance: Coverage page shows color-coded matrix; clicking a cell shows linked test cases

tasks.acceptance: Test plan CRUD works; plans link to iterations and allow case assignment/unassignment

tasks.acceptance: All CUD operations generate audit log entries with user_id, action, path, and timestamp

tasks.title: Input sanitizer
tasks.description: Input sanitization utility that strips XSS vectors and normalizes user input across all endpoints.
tasks.acceptance: Sanitizer removes script tags, event handlers, and dangerous attributes from string inputs

tasks.title: RBAC permissions system
tasks.description: Role-based access control with permission checking middleware and role definitions.
tasks.acceptance: Permission checks enforce role-based access; admin/editor/viewer roles with configurable permissions

tasks.title: Lazy-loaded DB engine with @lru_cache
tasks.description: Database engine creation deferred via @lru_cache to avoid connection at import time.
tasks.acceptance: Importing database module does not create connections; first query triggers engine creation

tasks.title: Health check endpoint
tasks.description: Health check endpoint that verifies database, Redis, MinIO, and Qdrant connectivity.
tasks.acceptance: GET /api/health returns status of each service (pg/redis/minio/qdrant) with response times

tasks.title: Structured logging with request tracing
tasks.description: Structured JSON logging with request_id propagation across async tasks and services.
tasks.acceptance: Logs include request_id, user_id, module, and structured JSON format; request_id traces across Celery tasks

tasks.title: Error response standardization
tasks.description: Standardized error response format with error codes, messages, and optional details across all endpoints.
tasks.acceptance: All API errors return {code, message, details} format; 400/401/403/404/500 handled consistently

tasks.title: API versioning strategy
tasks.description: API versioning via URL prefix (/api/v1/) with version negotiation support.
tasks.acceptance: All endpoints accessible under /api/v1/ prefix; version header returned in responses

tasks.title: Database connection pool tuning
tasks.description: Connection pool configuration with appropriate pool_size, max_overflow, and pool_recycle settings.
tasks.acceptance: Pool settings configured for production load; no connection exhaustion under concurrent requests

tasks.title: Redis session store
tasks.description: Redis-based session storage for user sessions with configurable TTL.
tasks.acceptance: User sessions stored in Redis with automatic expiration; session data retrievable by session_id

tasks.title: CI/CD pipeline setup
tasks.description: GitHub Actions CI pipeline with lint, type check, test, and build stages.
tasks.acceptance: CI pipeline runs ruff/pyright/pytest for backend and biome/tsc/build for frontend on every PR

tasks.title: Production Docker build
tasks.description: Multi-stage Dockerfile for production builds of both frontend and backend.
tasks.acceptance: Docker build produces optimized images; frontend served by nginx, backend by uvicorn with gunicorn

tasks.title: Environment-specific config management
tasks.description: Configuration management supporting development, staging, and production environments.
tasks.acceptance: App loads correct config based on APP_ENV; secrets from env vars, defaults from config files

tasks.title: pytest + pytest-asyncio test framework setup
tasks.description: Test framework configured with pytest, pytest-asyncio (auto mode), and project-specific conftest.
tasks.acceptance: pytest -v runs and discovers tests; asyncio_mode=auto enables async test functions

tasks.title: conftest.py with shared fixtures
tasks.description: Shared test fixtures including mock DB session, mock Redis, mock LLM client, and test data factories.
tasks.acceptance: conftest.py provides async_session, mock_redis, mock_llm, and factory fixtures for all test modules

tasks.title: Test database fixture (test pg or sqlite)
tasks.description: Test database fixture using either test PostgreSQL instance or SQLite for fast unit testing.
tasks.acceptance: Test database fixture creates/drops tables per test session; supports both pg and sqlite backends

tasks.title: Unit tests for generation service
tasks.description: Unit tests covering session creation, message storage, case parsing, and list_messages_with_cases.
tasks.acceptance: Generation service tests cover create_session, add_message, parse_cases, list_messages_with_cases

tasks.title: Unit tests for diagnosis service
tasks.description: Unit tests covering diagnosis session, scanner invocation, questioner flow, and risk extraction.
tasks.acceptance: Diagnosis service tests cover scan, question, answer, and risk extraction flows

tasks.title: Unit tests for scene_map service
tasks.description: Unit tests covering scene map generation, node CRUD, confirm/reject, and tree traversal.
tasks.acceptance: Scene map service tests cover generate, add_node, confirm_node, reject_node, get_tree

tasks.title: Unit tests for testcases service
tasks.description: Unit tests covering test case CRUD, filtering, pagination, batch operations, and soft delete.
tasks.acceptance: TestCase service tests cover CRUD, filter_by_status, paginate, batch_delete, soft_delete

tasks.title: Unit tests for import_clean service
tasks.description: Unit tests covering CSV import trigger, progress tracking, and status reporting.
tasks.acceptance: Import clean service tests cover trigger, get_status, and progress tracking with mock Celery

tasks.title: Unit tests for coverage service
tasks.description: Unit tests covering coverage matrix aggregation, percentage calculation, and uncovered detection.
tasks.acceptance: Coverage service tests cover matrix_build, calculate_percentages, find_uncovered

tasks.title: Unit tests for diff service
tasks.description: Unit tests covering text diff, semantic analysis invocation, and impact report generation.
tasks.acceptance: Diff service tests cover text_diff, semantic_analyze, generate_impact_report

tasks.title: Unit tests for knowledge service
tasks.description: Unit tests covering knowledge CRUD, document chunking trigger, and search.
tasks.acceptance: Knowledge service tests cover CRUD, trigger_embedding, search_similar

tasks.title: Unit tests for export service
tasks.description: Unit tests covering Excel and CSV export generation with column selection.
tasks.acceptance: Export service tests cover export_excel, export_csv with column filtering and formatting

tasks.title: Unit tests for analytics service
tasks.description: Unit tests covering metric aggregation, trend calculation, and distribution queries.
tasks.acceptance: Analytics service tests cover get_overview, get_trends, get_distribution with mock data

tasks.title: Engine unit tests: case_gen
tasks.description: Unit tests for case generation engine covering chat-driven, doc-driven, and template-driven modes.
tasks.acceptance: Case gen engine tests cover all three modes with mocked LLM; verify prompt construction and output parsing

tasks.title: Engine unit tests: diagnosis
tasks.description: Unit tests for diagnosis engine covering scanner, questioner, checklist, and quality evaluator.
tasks.acceptance: Diagnosis engine tests cover scan, question_generation, checklist_build, quality_evaluate with mocked LLM

tasks.title: Engine unit tests: scene_map
tasks.description: Unit tests for scene map engine covering generator and validator.
tasks.acceptance: Scene map engine tests cover generate_map, validate_coverage with mocked LLM

tasks.title: Engine unit tests: diff
tasks.description: Unit tests for diff engine covering impact analyzer, regenerator, and suggestion.
tasks.acceptance: Diff engine tests cover analyze_impact, regenerate_cases, suggest_changes with mocked LLM

tasks.title: Engine unit tests: rag
tasks.description: Unit tests for RAG engine covering embedder, retriever, and chunker.
tasks.acceptance: RAG engine tests cover embed_text, retrieve_similar, chunk_document with mocked Qdrant client

tasks.title: Engine unit tests: uda
tasks.description: Unit tests for UDA engine covering image handler, OCR parser, and AST types.
tasks.acceptance: UDA engine tests cover handle_image, ocr_parse, ast_construction with sample documents

tasks.title: Integration tests for SSE streaming
tasks.description: Integration tests verifying end-to-end SSE streaming from API request to client-side event consumption.
tasks.acceptance: SSE integration tests verify event stream format, token delivery, and stream completion with test client

tasks.title: Integration tests for LLM calling chain
tasks.description: Integration tests verifying the full LLM calling chain with retry, fallback, and error handling.
tasks.acceptance: LLM chain integration tests cover success, retry, fallback, and timeout scenarios with mocked providers

tasks.title: Frontend component tests setup (vitest)
tasks.description: Set up vitest with React Testing Library for frontend component unit testing.
tasks.acceptance: vitest configured and runs sample component test; React Testing Library available for component rendering

tasks.title: Frontend biome lint baseline
tasks.description: Establish biome lint baseline with zero errors across all frontend source files.
tasks.acceptance: bunx biome check . passes with zero errors and zero warnings on all frontend source files

tasks.title: Backend ruff lint baseline
tasks.description: Establish ruff lint baseline with zero errors across all backend source files.
tasks.acceptance: uv run ruff check . passes with zero errors on all backend Python files

tasks.title: Type check baseline (pyright + tsc)
tasks.description: Establish type checking baseline with pyright (standard mode) and tsc (--noEmit) passing.
tasks.acceptance: uv run pyright app/ and bunx tsc --noEmit both pass with zero errors
